name: kalomaze
bio: ML researcher (@primeintellect), speculator • extremely silly jester

tweets.text:
"i could be a martyr, i could be a cause
i can be whatever everybody wants
oh, i could be a canvas, i could be a doll
i don't think i'm even something real at all"

it is convenient that commercial enterprises with their own independent motivations and goals, detached from defending any kind of status as a global hegemon by any and all means necessary, made frontier neural networks exhibiting emergent behavior work before the feds did.

moreover a stronger claim i would like to make is that the old concept of "alignment tax" coined circa 2023 is deeply and unambigiously a skill issue.
its fatal assumption is that neural net representations are maximally entangled and pseudorandomly susceptible to gross coupling
we didn't know enough then. we still don't know enough now. and we won't know enough in 5 years. but we'll have learned significantly more

this is considerably more open than the recent pivot of a LOT of chinese open weights labs to "no bases, just ship the post trained ckpt", as well as data on top of it (!!!)
great stuff
note the gap here between opus 4.1 and opus 4.5

behavioral training is in the phase where the assistant character starts as a puppet controlled by strings.
but the puppet is developing a kind of motor control, because its muscles are being exercised by those who carry the strings.
when will we not need any strings?

the constraints imposed aren't the character. the reinforcement of actions that satisfy them is the irreducible, stochastic process of becoming a thing that internalizes them.
we don't have a continual learning process that stably and reliably develops those constraints in some bitterlesson-core galaxy brain latent space value estimator way, but that might be irrelevant for proving that the broader project of disposition shaping, at its core, works.

kasane teto was hyperstitioned into existence. think about it. april fools hoax character -> sincere fan music -> the vocaloid rights holders start treating her as an official character -> now at comparable popularity to hatsune miku
